data.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood ✓ — CLI only supports: ticket create <type> <title> [--parent=<id>] [--priority <n>] [--assignee <name>]. No -t, -p, -d, --description, or --acceptance flags. Also found issue at line 439 (interface-contracts section) and preplanning SKILL.md also uses -t syntax.
